item.title: Erica Alonso: Valentine’s Day Disappearance
item.description: She vanished after meeting her boyfriend on Valentine’s Day. What happened to Erica Alonso, and what theories surround her case?

item.title: Sarah & Amina Said: A 911 Call Identified Their Killer
item.description: Sisters Sarah and Amina Said made a desperate 911 call that revealed their killer. How did investigators piece together this tragic case?

item.title: The Tragic Story of Luz Gonzalez
item.description: At just four years old, Luz Gonzalez’s life was cut short in heartbreaking circumstances. What happened that day, and why does her story still demand answers?

item.title: She Disappeared After Leaving a Bar With Two Men!
item.description: A night out ended in mystery when a young woman vanished after leaving a bar with two men. What happened next, and what secrets might this case still hold?

item.title: Madeline Sophia Soto – February 26, 2024
item.description: Thirteen‑year‑old Madeline Soto vanished on her way to school in Florida, sparking a desperate search. What happened on that heartbreaking Monday, and how did investigators uncover the truth?

media:content.media:title: Madeline Sophia Soto – February 26, 2024
media:content.media:description: Thirteen‑year‑old Madeline Soto vanished on her way to school in Florida, sparking a desperate search. What happened on that heartbreaking Monday, and how did investigators uncover the truth?
